name: Daniel & Nicolette
overview: Nicole wants to stand on stage as a DJ, become a musician so famous that she can catch up with her boyfriend, Stevan, in Paris. For the sake of his dream, he is determined to do everything including becoming a personal assistant to Daniel, the owner of a hotel and restaurant from the Maestro group while continuing to strive to realize his dream.

trailers.title: Trailer Resmi | Daniel & Nicolette | Cinta Laura, Susan Sameh, Jihane Almira, Jerome Kurnia
